name: Strength in Numbers
text: Until end of turn, creatures you control get +X/+X, where X is the number of creatures you control minus the greatest number of creatures any single opponent controls. (If that number is negative, the movement is smaller than the machine, and X is 0. Keep organizing.)
flavorText: One neighbor is a complaint. A hundred neighbors are a recall. A thousand neighbors are a parking problem AND a recall.

extras.frontrunnerPunish: scales vs the biggest opponent board
